title: Bicycle Race
meaning_summary: Bicycle Race gives Jazz a second tracked song because it remains one of Queen's more recognizable playful catalog records alongside Don't Stop Me Now.
revenue_drivers: Queen catalog listening keeps secondary singles active around the biggest hits.
Novelty, chorus recognition, and playlist context support repeat discovery.
Album-halo traffic from Jazz helps the song remain commercially visible.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models Queen catalog replay, album-halo listening, and writer-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label catalog master with band/estate royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears valuable because of Queen writer-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog-sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a disclosed royalty statement.
